name: @aristotle/gel-timestamp-rfc3161-verify
description: X.509 chain validation companion to @aristotle/gel-timestamp-rfc3161. Verifies the TimeStampToken embedded in a TimestampAnchor against a caller-supplied CA bundle, closing the verification loop the RFC 3161 client deliberately deferred. Uses Node's built-in crypto.X509Certificate (no library dependency); supports the most common chain validation cases.
